Vector Space Models (VSMs) are a fundamental concept in NLP, providing a mathematical representation of words and documents. The key aspects of VSMs include:

  • Vector Representation: Each word is represented as a vector, where each dimension corresponds to a feature or context word.
  • Semantic Similarity: The similarity between two words is measured by the cosine similarity between their vectors.
  • Dimensionality Reduction: Techniques like PCA or t-SNE can be used to reduce the high dimensionality of these vector spaces while preserving the semantic relationships between words.

<content><![CDATA[import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client';
import { GoogleGenAI } from "@google/genai";

// --- Audio System (Synthesizer) ---
// No external assets needed. We synthesize retro game sounds on the fly.

const SoundSynth = {
  ctx: null as AudioContext | null,
  
  init: () => {
    if (!SoundSynth.ctx) {
      SoundSynth.ctx = new (window.AudioContext || (window as any).webkitAudioContext)();
    }
    if (SoundSynth.ctx.state === 'suspended') {
      SoundSynth.ctx.resume();
    }
  },

  playTone: (freq: number, type: 'sine' | 'square' | 'triangle' | 'sawtooth', duration: number, startTime = 0) => {
    if (!SoundSynth.ctx) SoundSynth.init();
    const ctx = SoundSynth.ctx!;
    const osc = ctx.createOscillator();
    const gain = ctx.createGain();
    
    osc.type = type;
    osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(freq, ctx.currentTime + startTime);
    
    gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.1, ctx.currentTime + startTime);
    gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, ctx.currentTime + startTime + duration);
    
    osc.connect(gain);
    gain.connect(ctx.destination);
    
    osc.start(ctx.currentTime + startTime);
    osc.stop(ctx.currentTime + startTime + duration);
  },

  play: (effect: 'pop' | 'correct' | 'wrong' | 'success' | 'complete' | 'click' | 'match') => {
    SoundSynth.init();
    switch (effect) {
      case 'pop':
        SoundSynth.playTone(600 + Math.random() * 200, 'sine', 0.1);
        break;
      case 'click':
        SoundSynth.playTone(400, 'sine', 0.05);
        break;
      case 'match':
         SoundSynth.playTone(880, 'sine', 0.1);
         break;
      case 'correct':
        SoundSynth.playTone(523.25, 'sine', 0.1, 0); // C5
        SoundSynth.playTone(659.25, 'sine', 0.1, 0.1); // E5
        SoundSynth.playTone(783.99, 'sine', 0.2, 0.2); // G5
        break;
      case 'wrong':
        SoundSynth.playTone(150, 'sawtooth', 0.3);
        SoundSynth.playTone(100, 'sawtooth', 0.3, 0.1);
        break;
      case 'success': // Fanfare
        [523.25, 659.25, 783.99, 1046.50].forEach((f, i) => {
             SoundSynth.playTone(f, 'triangle', 0.3, i * 0.1);
        });
        break;
       case 'complete':
         SoundSynth.playTone(440, 'sine', 0.1);
         break;
    }
  }
};

// --- Confetti Component ---

const Confetti = () => {
  const canvasRef = useRef<HTMLCanvasElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    const canvas = canvasRef.current;
    if (!canvas) return;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    if (!ctx) return;

    canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
    canvas.height = window.innerHeight;

    const particles: {x: number, y: number, color: string, v: {x: number, y: number}, spin: number}[] = [];
    const colors = ['#EF4444', '#F59E0B', '#10B981', '#3B82F6', '#8B5CF6'];

    for (let i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
      particles.push({
        x: window.innerWidth / 2,
        y: window.innerHeight / 2,
        color: colors[Math.floor(Math.random() * colors.length)],
        v: {
          x: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 15,
          y: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 15 - 5 // burst up
        },
        spin: Math.random() * 0.2 - 0.1
      });
    }

    let animationId: number;
    const render = () => {
      ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
      
      particles.forEach((p, i) => {
        p.x += p.v.x;
        p.y += p.v.y;
        p.v.y += 0.2; // gravity
        p.v.x *= 0.96; // friction
        
        ctx.save();
        ctx.translate(p.x, p.y);
        ctx.rotate(p.spin * i); // simple spin
        ctx.fillStyle = p.color;
        ctx.fillRect(-5, -5, 10, 10);
        ctx.restore();
      });

      // Remove particles off screen
      if (particles.some(p => p.y < canvas.height)) {
         animationId = requestAnimationFrame(render);
      }
    };
    render();

    return () => cancelAnimationFrame(animationId);
  }, []);

  return <canvas ref={canvasRef} className="fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none z-[70]" />;
};

const ChatSensei = ({ context, onClose }: { context: string, onClose: () => void }) => {
  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<{role: 'user'|'model', text: string}[]>([
    { role: 'model', text: "我是你的AI导师。关于这节课，尽管问我！" }
  ]);

  const scrollToBottom = () => {
    messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth" });
  };

  useEffect(scrollToBottom, [messages]);

  const handleSend = async () => {
    if (!input.trim() || loading) return;
    SoundSynth.play('pop');
    const userMsg = input;
    setMessages(prev => [...prev, { role: 'user', text: userMsg }]);
    setInput("");
    setLoading(true);

    try {
      const ai = new GoogleGenAI({ apiKey: process.env.API_KEY });
      const response = await ai.models.generateContent({
        model: 'gemini-3-flash-preview',

            }

      });
      
      const text = response.text;
      SoundSynth.play('pop');
      setMessages(prev => [...prev, { role: 'model', text: text }]);
    } catch (e) {
      setMessages(prev => [...prev, { role: 'model', text: "我与以太的连接微弱。请重试。" }]);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (

// --- Question Components ---

const MatchGame = ({ step, onCorrect }: { step: LessonStep, onCorrect: () => void }) => {
    const [leftSelected, setLeftSelected] = useState<string | null>(null);
    const [matched, setMatched] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());
    const [shuffledRight, setShuffledRight] = useState<{id: string, text: string}[]>([]);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (step.pairs) {
            const rightItems = step.pairs.map(p => ({ id: p.left, text: p.right }));
            setShuffledRight(rightItems.sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5));
        }
    }, [step]);

    const handleLeftClick = (id: string) => {
        if (matched.has(id)) return;
        SoundSynth.play('pop');
        setLeftSelected(id);
    };

    const handleRightClick = (id: string) => {
        if (matched.has(id)) return;
        
        if (leftSelected === id) {
            SoundSynth.play('match');
            const newMatched = new Set(matched);
            newMatched.add(id);
            setMatched(newMatched);
            setLeftSelected(null);
            
            if (newMatched.size === step.pairs?.length) {
                setTimeout(onCorrect, 500);
            }
        } else {
             SoundSynth.play('wrong');
             setLeftSelected(null);
        }
    };

    return (
        <div className="w-full flex gap-4 justify-between animate-slide-up">
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 w-1/2">
                {step.pairs?.map(pair => (
                    <button
                        key={pair.left}
                        onClick={() => handleLeftClick(pair.left)}
                        disabled={matched.has(pair.left)}
                        className={`
                            p-4 rounded-xl border-2 text-sm sm:text-base font-bold transition-all
                            ${matched.has(pair.left) ? 'bg-green-100 border-green-500 opacity-50' : 
                              leftSelected === pair.left ? 'bg-blue-100 border-blue-500 scale-105' : 'bg-white border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50'}
                        `}
                    >
                        {pair.left}
                    </button>
                ))}
            </div>
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 w-1/2">
                {shuffledRight.map(item => (
                    <button
                        key={item.id}
                        onClick={() => handleRightClick(item.id)}
                        disabled={matched.has(item.id)}
                        className={`
                            p-4 rounded-xl border-2 text-sm sm:text-base transition-all
                            ${matched.has(item.id) ? 'bg-green-100 border-green-500 opacity-50' : 'bg-white border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50'}
                        `}
                    >
                        {item.text}
                    </button>
                ))}
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

const FillBlank = ({ step, onResult }: { step: LessonStep, onResult: (correct: boolean) => void }) => {
    const [selected, setSelected] = useState<string | null>(null);
    const [isSubmitted, setIsSubmitted] = useState(false);

    const check = () => {
        if (!selected) return;
        setIsSubmitted(true);
        onResult(selected === step.correct);
    };

    return (
        <div className="w-full animate-slide-up">
            <div className="bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl border-2 border-gray-200 mb-8 flex flex-wrap gap-2 items-baseline text-xl leading-relaxed">
                {step.parts?.map((part, i) => (
                    part === "___" ? (
                        <span key={i} className={`
                            border-b-4 px-2 font-bold min-w-[80px] text-center transition-colors
                            ${isSubmitted ? (selected === step.correct ? 'border-green-500 text-green-600' : 'border-red-500 text-red-600') : 'border-gray-300 text-indigo-600'}
                        `}>
                            {selected || "____"}
                        </span>
                    ) : (
                        <span key={i}>{part}</span>
                    )
                ))}
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                {step.options?.map(opt => (
                    <button
                        key={opt}
                        onClick={() => { if(!isSubmitted) { SoundSynth.play('pop'); setSelected(opt); } }}
                        className={`
                            p-4 rounded-xl border-b-4 font-bold text-lg transition-all active:translate-y-1 active:border-b-0
                            ${selected === opt ? 'bg-indigo-100 border-indigo-400 text-indigo-700' : 'bg-white border-gray-300 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50'}
                        `}
                    >
                        {opt}
                    </button>
                ))}
            </div>
             
             {!isSubmitted && (
                <button 
                    onClick={check}
                    disabled={!selected}
                    className="w-full mt-6 bg-green-500 text-white py-3 rounded-xl font-bold uppercase tracking-wide disabled:opacity-50"
                >
                    确认
                </button>
             )}
        </div>
    );
};

        <div className="absolute left-1/2 top-10 bottom-10 w-2 bg-gray-200 -translate-x-1/2 -z-10 rounded-full"></div>

                    if (isUnlocked) {
                        SoundSynth.play('pop');
                        onSelectWeek(week.id);

                className={`
                   relative flex flex-col items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer transition-transform hover:scale-105
                   ${index % 2 === 0 ? 'self-start ml-8' : 'self-end mr-8'}

                `}
                style={{animationDelay: `${index * 0.1}s`}}
              >
                 <div className={`
                    w-20 h-20 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-3xl shadow-lg border-4

                    ${isCompleted ? 'ring-4 ring-green-400' : ''}

                 `}>
                    <i className={`fa-solid ${isUnlocked ? week.icon : 'fa-lock'}`}></i>
                 </div>
                 <div className="bg-white px-3 py-1 rounded-lg shadow-sm text-center min-w-[120px]">
                    <div className="font-bold text-sm text-gray-800">{week.title}</div>
                 </div>

            );

        {/* Final Goal */}
        <div className="self-center mt-8 text-center opacity-50 animate-slide-up" style={{animationDelay: '0.8s'}}>
           <i className="fa-solid fa-crown text-4xl text-gray-400 mb-2"></i>
           <p className="text-xs font-bold text-gray-500">召唤神龙</p>

      </div>

};

const WeekLevelView = ({ weekId, completedDays, onPlayDay, onBack }: { weekId: number, completedDays: number, onPlayDay: (day: number) => void, onBack: () => void }) => {
    const week = WEEKS.find(w => w.id === weekId);

    return (
        <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#3f64e7] relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col">
            <div className="p-4 text-white z-10 flex items-center gap-4">
                <button onClick={() => { SoundSynth.play('pop'); onBack(); }} className="hover:bg-white/20 p-2 rounded-full transition"><i className="fa-solid fa-arrow-left"></i></button>
                <h2 className="text-xl font-bold">{week?.title}</h2>
            </div>
            
            <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center relative pb-20">
                {WEEK_1_CONTENT.map((day, idx) => {
                    const isUnlocked = idx <= completedDays;
                    const isCompleted = idx < completedDays;
                    const isCurrent = idx === completedDays;
                    const offsetClass = idx % 2 === 0 ? '-translate-x-12' : 'translate-x-12';
                    
                    return (
                        <div key={day.day} className={`relative my-4 transition-all duration-500 ${offsetClass} animate-pop`} style={{animationDelay: `${idx * 0.1}s`}}>
                            <button 
                                onClick={() => {
                                    if (isUnlocked) {
                                        SoundSynth.play('pop');
                                        onPlayDay(day.day);
                                    }
                                }}

                                className={`
                                    w-20 h-20 rounded-full border-b-8 flex items-center justify-center text-2xl shadow-xl transition-transform active:translate-y-1 active:border-b-0
                                    ${isCompleted ? 'bg-yellow-400 border-yellow-600 text-yellow-900' : ''}
                                    ${isCurrent ? 'bg-orange-500 border-orange-700 text-white animate-bounce-slight' : ''}

                            <div className="absolute top-full mt-2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 bg-black/40 text-white text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded whitespace-nowrap">

};

const LessonEngine = ({ dayId, onComplete, onExit }: { dayId: number, onComplete: () => void, onExit: () => void }) => {
    // Basic state
    const lessonData = WEEK_1_CONTENT.find(d => d.day === dayId);
    // We create a working copy of steps because we might append mistakes to it
    const [steps, setSteps] = useState<LessonStep[]>([]);
    const [stepIndex, setStepIndex] = useState(0);
    const [mistakes, setMistakes] = useState<LessonStep[]>([]);
    const [isReviewMode, setIsReviewMode] = useState(false);

    // Interactive state
    const [selectedOption, setSelectedOption] = useState<number | null>(null);
    const [showResult, setShowResult] = useState(false);
    const [isCorrect, setIsCorrect] = useState(false);
    const [shake, setShake] = useState(false);
    const [showSensei, setShowSensei] = useState(false);

    useEffect(() => {
        if (lessonData) {
            setSteps(lessonData.steps);
        }
    }, [lessonData]);

    // Reset interaction state on step change
    useEffect(() => {
       setSelectedOption(null);
       setShowResult(false);
       setIsCorrect(false);
       setShake(false);
    }, [stepIndex, isReviewMode]);

    if (!steps.length) return <div>加载中...</div>;

    const currentStep = steps[stepIndex];

    const handleQuizCheck = () => {
        if (!showResult && selectedOption !== null) {
            const correct = selectedOption === currentStep.correct;
            setIsCorrect(correct);
            setShowResult(true);
            if (correct) {
                SoundSynth.play('correct');
            } else {
                SoundSynth.play('wrong');
                setShake(true);
                setTimeout(() => setShake(false), 500);
                // Add to mistakes if not already in review mode
                if (!isReviewMode) {
                    setMistakes(prev => [...prev, currentStep]);
                }
            }
        }
    };

    const handleMatchComplete = () => {
        setIsCorrect(true);
        setShowResult(true);
        SoundSynth.play('correct');
    };

    const handleFillResult = (correct: boolean) => {
        setIsCorrect(correct);
        setShowResult(true);
        if (correct) {
            SoundSynth.play('correct');
        } else {
            SoundSynth.play('wrong');
            if (!isReviewMode) {
                setMistakes(prev => [...prev, currentStep]);
            }
        }
    };

    const handleContinue = () => {
        SoundSynth.play('pop');
        
        // Check if we are at the end of the current queue
        if (stepIndex < steps.length - 1) {
            setStepIndex(prev => prev + 1);
        } else {
            // End of current steps
            if (!isReviewMode && mistakes.length > 0) {
                // Enter review mode
                setSteps(mistakes);
                setStepIndex(0);
                setMistakes([]); // Clear mistakes as we are addressing them
                setIsReviewMode(true);
            } else if (isReviewMode && mistakes.length > 0) {
                // If failed again in review mode, repeat review
                setSteps(mistakes);
                setStepIndex(0);
                setMistakes([]);
                // Stay in review mode
            } else {
                // Truly done
                SoundSynth.play('complete');
                onComplete();
            }
        }
    };

    const handleBack = () => {
        if (stepIndex > 0) {
            SoundSynth.play('click');
            setStepIndex(prev => prev - 1);
        }
    };

    return (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-white z-50 flex flex-col">
            {/* Header */}
            <div className={`p-4 flex items-center gap-4 ${isReviewMode ? 'bg-orange-100' : ''}`}>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <button onClick={() => { SoundSynth.play('click'); onExit(); }} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600">
                        <i className="fa-solid fa-xmark text-2xl"></i>
                    </button>
                    <button 
                        onClick={handleBack} 
                        disabled={stepIndex === 0}
                        className={`p-2 rounded-full transition ${stepIndex === 0 ? 'text-gray-200 cursor-not-allowed' : 'text-gray-400 hover:bg-gray-100 hover:text-gray-600'}`}
                        title="回退"
                    >
                        <i className="fa-solid fa-arrow-left text-xl"></i>
                    </button>
                </div>
                <div className="flex-1">
                    {isReviewMode ? (
                         <div className="text-center font-bold text-orange-600 animate-pulse">
                             <i className="fa-solid fa-rotate-left"></i> 错题复习中...
                         </div>
                    ) : (
                        <ProgressBar current={stepIndex + 1} total={steps.length} />
                    )}
                </div>
            </div>

            {/* Content Area */}
            <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6 max-w-2xl mx-auto w-full overflow-y-auto">
                
                {(currentStep.type === 'theory' || currentStep.type === 'boss') && (
                    <div className="text-center animate-slide-up">
                        <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6 text-gray-800">
                            {currentStep.isBoss ? "终极考验" : "新发现"}
                        </h2>
                        <div className={`text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed mb-8 border-l-4 pl-4 text-left ${currentStep.isBoss ? 'border-red-600 bg-red-50 p-4' : 'border-orange-400'}`}>
                            {currentStep.content}
                        </div>
                        <div className={`text-6xl mb-8 ${currentStep.isBoss ? 'text-red-600' : 'text-orange-400'} animate-bounce-slight`}>
                            <i className={`fa-solid ${currentStep.isBoss ? 'fa-dragon' : 'fa-lightbulb'}`}></i>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                )}

                {currentStep.type === 'quiz' && (
                    <div className="w-full animate-slide-up">
                        <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-8 text-gray-800">{currentStep.question}</h2>
                        <div className={`space-y-4 ${shake ? 'animate-shake' : ''}`}>
                            {currentStep.options?.map((opt, idx) => (
                                <button
                                    key={idx}
                                    onClick={() => {
                                        if (!showResult) {
                                            SoundSynth.play('pop');
                                            setSelectedOption(idx);
                                        }
                                    }}
                                    className={`
                                        w-full p-4 rounded-xl border-2 text-left text-lg font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
                                        ${showResult && idx === currentStep.correct ? 'bg-green-100 border-green-500 text-green-700' : ''}
                                        ${showResult && idx === selectedOption && idx !== currentStep.correct ? 'bg-red-100 border-red-500 text-red-700' : ''}
                                        ${!showResult && selectedOption === idx ? 'bg-blue-100 border-blue-500 text-blue-700' : 'bg-white border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50'}
                                    `}
                                >
                                    {opt}
                                </button>
                            ))}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                )}

                {currentStep.type === 'match' && (
                    <div className="w-full">
                         <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6 text-gray-800">{currentStep.question}</h2>
                         <MatchGame step={currentStep} onCorrect={handleMatchComplete} />
                    </div>
                )}

                {currentStep.type === 'fill' && (
                    <div className="w-full">
                         <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6 text-gray-800">{currentStep.question}</h2>
                         <FillBlank step={currentStep} onResult={handleFillResult} />
                    </div>
                )}

            </div>

            {/* AI Sensei Button */}
            <div className="absolute top-20 right-4">
                <button 
                  onClick={() => { SoundSynth.play('pop'); setShowSensei(true); }}
                  className="bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-600 w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-indigo-200 shadow-sm border border-indigo-200 transition-transform hover:scale-110 active:scale-90"
                  title="Ask AI Sensei"
                >
                    <i className="fa-solid fa-robot"></i>
                </button>
            </div>
            {showSensei && <ChatSensei context={currentStep.type === 'theory' || currentStep.type === 'boss' ? currentStep.content : currentStep.question || ""} onClose={() => setShowSensei(false)} />}

            {/* Footer */}
            <div className={`p-4 border-t ${showResult ? (isCorrect ? 'bg-green-100 border-green-300' : 'bg-red-100 border-red-300') : 'bg-white'}`}>
                <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto flex justify-between items-center">
                    {showResult && (
                        <div className="flex gap-3 items-center animate-pop">
                            <div className={`w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-white ${isCorrect ? 'bg-green-500' : 'bg-red-500'}`}>
                                <i className={`fa-solid ${isCorrect ? 'fa-check' : 'fa-xmark'}`}></i>
                            </div>
                            <div className={`font-bold ${isCorrect ? 'text-green-700' : 'text-red-700'}`}>
                                {isCorrect ? "正确！" : "再试试？"}
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    )}
                    <div className="flex-1"></div>
                    
                    {currentStep.type === 'quiz' && !showResult ? (
                        <button 
                            onClick={handleQuizCheck}
                            disabled={selectedOption === null}
                            className="px-8 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold text-white uppercase tracking-wide shadow-lg btn-press bg-green-500 hover:bg-green-600 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:transform-none"
                        >
                            检查
                        </button>
                    ) : null}

                    {(currentStep.type === 'match' || currentStep.type === 'fill' || currentStep.type === 'theory' || currentStep.type === 'boss') && !showResult && (currentStep.type === 'theory' || currentStep.type === 'boss') && (
                        <button 
                            onClick={handleContinue}
                            className="px-8 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold text-white uppercase tracking-wide shadow-lg btn-press bg-green-500 hover:bg-green-600"
                        >
                            继续
                        </button>
                    )}

                    {showResult && (
                        <button 
                            onClick={handleContinue}
                            className={`
                                px-8 py-3 rounded-xl font-bold text-white uppercase tracking-wide shadow-lg btn-press
                                ${!isCorrect ? 'bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600' : 'bg-green-500 hover:bg-green-600'}
                            `}
                        >
                            继续
                        </button>
                    )}
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    );
};

const App = () => {
  const [view, setView] = useState<'world' | 'week' | 'lesson'>('world');
  const [selectedWeekId, setSelectedWeekId] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [selectedDayId, setSelectedDayId] = useState<number | null>(null);
  
  // Progress State
  const [unlockedWeek, setUnlockedWeek] = useState(1);
  const [collectedBalls, setCollectedBalls] = useState(0);
  const [completedDays, setCompletedDays] = useState(0); // For Week 1 demo

  const [showConfetti, setShowConfetti] = useState(false);

  const handleSelectWeek = (id: number) => {
    setSelectedWeekId(id);
    setView('week');
  };

  const handleBackToWorld = () => {
    setView('world');
    setSelectedWeekId(null);
  };

  const handlePlayDay = (dayId: number) => {
    setSelectedDayId(dayId);
    setView('lesson');
  };

  const handleLessonExit = () => {
    setView('week');
    setSelectedDayId(null);
  };

  const handleLessonComplete = () => {
    // Update progress logic
    if (selectedWeekId === 1) {
        if (selectedDayId === completedDays + 1) {
            const newCompleted = completedDays + 1;
            setCompletedDays(newCompleted);
            
            if (newCompleted === WEEK_1_CONTENT.length) {
                setCollectedBalls(prev => Math.min(prev + 1, 7));
                if (unlockedWeek < WEEKS.length) {
                    setUnlockedWeek(prev => prev + 1);
                }
                setShowConfetti(true);
                setTimeout(() => setShowConfetti(false), 5000);
            }
        }
    }
    
    setView('week');
    setSelectedDayId(null);
  };

  return (
    <div className="font-sans bg-gray-50 min-h-screen select-none text-gray-900">
        {showConfetti && <Confetti />}
        
        {view === 'world' && (
            <WorldMap 
                unlockedWeek={unlockedWeek} 
                onSelectWeek={handleSelectWeek}
                collectedBalls={collectedBalls}
            />
        )}

        {view === 'week' && selectedWeekId && (
            <WeekLevelView 
                weekId={selectedWeekId} 
                completedDays={completedDays} 
                onPlayDay={handlePlayDay} 
                onBack={handleBackToWorld} 
            />
        )}

        {view === 'lesson' && selectedDayId && (
            <LessonEngine 
                dayId={selectedDayId} 
                onComplete={handleLessonComplete} 
                onExit={handleLessonExit} 
            />
        )}
    </div>
  );
};

const root = createRoot(document.getElementById('root')!);
root.render(<App />);

请按照这个内容，写下第6周最后一天的游戏： Week 6 Day 7 | 终极试炼：唤醒你的“全自动情报龙”
Theme: The Automated News Assistant Mini-Project
今日目标： 将本周学到的 Agent、API 数据抓取、自动化触发器和 Pipeline 设计融会贯通，搭建一个真正能为你服务的自动化情报系统。

环节一：任务简报 (Mission Briefing)
形式： 一段简短的、带有情境感的视频或图文介绍。

🐲 导师独白： “驯龙师，经过一周的训练，你的龙已经学会了使用工具、拆解任务，甚至能通过 API 嗅探外部世界的信息。

今天不再有新的知识点，只有一个目标：让你的龙独立工作。

你的任务是构建一个‘自动新闻助手’。从明天起，我希望你还在睡梦中时，你的龙就已经飞遍网络，为你抓取、筛选、总结好了你最关心的行业动态，并准时发送到你的手机上。

这不是演习，是一次真正的自动化部署。”

环节二：实战挑战 (The Build Challenge)
形式： 一个交互式的任务清单面板，提供必要的支架（Scaffolding），但不提供标准答案。

🛠️ 项目名称： Project Morning Star (晨星计划) 🎯 核心要求： 你的自动化工作流必须完成以下闭环：

触发 (Trigger)： 每天早晨定时触发（例如 8:00 AM）。

抓取 (Fetch)： 自动从指定的网络来源（如 RSS Feed, 特定新闻网站 API, 或 Google Search 结果）获取关于特定主题（如“AI最新进展”）的内容。

加工 (Process)： 调用 AI 模型，将抓取到的杂乱信息总结成一份简报（不超过 500 字，列出 3 个重点）。

交付 (Deliver)： 将总结好的简报自动发送到你的私人渠道（Email, Telegram, Slack, 或飞书）。

💡 锦囊妙计 (可选提示，点击展开)：

卡在数据源？ 回顾 Day 39，有些网站提供现成的 API，没有的话，能否用 Agent 工具去搜索？

流程跑不通？ 拿出 Day 40 学过的 Pipeline 设计图，先画出流程节点，再一个一个配置工具。

连接不上应用？ 别忘了 Day 38 学过的 Zapier 或 IFTTT，它们是最好的粘合剂。

环节三：成果验证与上传 (Proof of Work)
形式： 这是一个关键的差异化环节。用户不需要上传复杂的配置截图或代码，而是上传自动化运行成功的直接证据。

🏆 提交你的“战利品”

我们不需要看你复杂的后台配置。我们只想知道，你的龙真的完成任务了吗？

请完成以下两步操作以解锁本周成就：

1. 上传证据截图 (Required): 请等待你的自动化流程第一次成功运行。然后，截图你实际收到的那份自动简报（例如：你邮箱里收到的晨报截图，或者 Telegram 里的消息截图）。 截图要求：需清晰显示发送时间、以及 AI 总结的内容。

[ 📁 点击上传图片 ]

2. 驯龙复盘 (Optional but Recommended): 在搭建这条流水线的过程中，最大的“坑”是什么？你是如何让 AI 成功绕过它的？（分享给社区的其他驯龙师参考）

[ 📝 输入你的复盘心得... ]

环节四：荣誉结算 (Achievement Unlocked)
系统反馈： 当后台审核通过用户的截图（确认为自动化生成的内容）后，弹出成功界面。

奖励： 颁发一枚特殊的数字徽章，例如 “自动化架构师 (Automation Architect)” 勋章，并解锁下一周的课程。

设计思路总结：
这个设计方案的核心在于：

以终为始： 用 Day 42 的 Mini-Project 作为驱动。

真实场景： 强迫用户解决一个真实的痛点（获取信息）。

结果导向的验证： 通过上传“运行结果截图”而非“过程代码”，来验证用户是否真的掌握了端到端的自动化能力。这比做选择题更能体现真实水平。

I'm building out the logic for RSS feeds and considering error handling and advanced agent features. The pipeline simulates a build, and I am currently working on error code and state management. I'm also planning the final polishing of the summarizing prompt and considering the best delivery channel for mobile alerts, with the ultimate goal of working on a comprehensive Match game as the ultimate task.
